key_content: Tracks 3 phases of implementation (Service Templates, Install Hooks Command, Integration & Testing)
Verification results for macOS launchd plist generation
Known limitation: launchctl commands hang due to sandbox restrictions

file_insights.purpose: Structured implementation roadmap with phase dependencies
key_content: 3 phases with clear dependency graph (Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3)
9 subtasks with individual verification commands and status tracking
Service integration details for macOS (launchd) and Linux (systemd)

file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive verification report for install-hooks functionality
key_content: Dynamic WatchPaths configuration with root and 5 team-specific done directories

patterns_discovered.pattern: Platform-abstraction via conditional compilation and OS detection
examples: Separate install_macos() and install_linux() functions in factory.rs
patterns_discovered.relevance: Core architectural pattern for cross-platform service management

examples: macOS: WatchPaths with KeepAlive=false replacing polling daemon
Linux: systemd path units (PathChanged) triggering one-shot services
Service template files as static resources bundled with binary
patterns_discovered.relevance: Eliminates need for continuous merge-gate polling process

examples: Team directory discovery via glob patterns (team-*)
WatchPaths array built dynamically from discovered directories
patterns_discovered.relevance: Allows scalable multi-team configuration without code changes

examples: Runtime substitution of paths and team directories
patterns_discovered.relevance: Separation of concerns between template data and installation logic

gotchas_discovered.issue: launchctl sandbox restrictions in test environment
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Core file I/O operations verified as working; launchctl invocation is deferred to production
gotchas_discovered.severity: low - functionality verified via file inspection

gotchas_discovered.issue: Dynamic team directory discovery must match dispatcher behavior
gotchas_discovered.symptom: WatchPaths might miss team directories added after installation
gotchas_discovered.scope: install-hooks command runs once at setup; new teams require reinstallation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documentation should clarify one-time setup nature
gotchas_discovered.severity: medium - documented limitation but not a blocker

gotchas_discovered.issue: Placeholder replacement in XML/INI files requires careful escaping
gotchas_discovered.symptom: XML special characters in paths could break plist validity
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: xmllint validation passes; recommend plist crate for safer generation
gotchas_discovered.severity: medium - XML escaping needed for production robustness

gotchas_discovered.issue: Resource limits hardcoded in plist template
gotchas_discovered.symptom: NumberOfFiles=512/1024 may be insufficient for large card workloads
gotchas_discovered.scope: macOS only; affects file descriptor limits for merge-gate process
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Test under load; consider parameterizing in future iterations
gotchas_discovered.severity: low - conservative limits suitable for initial deployment

deliverables_completed: macOS plist file generation verified (1.5K, 58 lines, valid XML)

recommendations.recommendation: Create user-facing documentation explaining event-driven merge-gate setup and limitations
recommendations.rationale: Users need clear guidance on one-time install-hooks setup, team directory discovery, and when reinstallation is needed

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test that verifies WatchPaths triggers merge-gate within 2-second SLA
recommendations.rationale: Core acceptance criterion (automatic triggering within 2s) needs automated validation in CI

recommendations.recommendation: Replace manual XML string manipulation with plist crate for safer serialization
recommendations.rationale: Current approach uses string replacement which could fail with special characters in paths; plist crate handles escaping automatically

recommendations.recommendation: Extract platform-specific logic into separate modules (install_hooks::macos, install_hooks::linux)
recommendations.rationale: Current main.rs implementation is growing; modularization improves readability and testability

recommendations.recommendation: Consider parameterizing resource limits (NumberOfFiles) based on system capabilities
recommendations.rationale: Current hardcoded limits may be conservative; dynamic tuning could optimize for different deployment scales
